backstory.original: He is Dungeon Master, your guide in the realm of Dungeons & Dragons!
backstory.display: 他就是地下城主，你在《龙与地下城》国度中的向导！

description.original: Dungeon Master fires white rays at a random enemy.
description.display: 地下城主向一名随机敌人发射白色射线。

longDescription.original: Dungeon Master fires 1 or more white rays at a random enemy.
longDescription.display: 地下城主向一名随机敌人发射 1 道或更多白色射线。

description.original: Dungeon Master waves his hands, and the Ultimate ability with the longest remaining cooldown immediately recharges.
description.display: 地下城主挥舞手臂，使当前剩余冷却时间最长的杀招技能立即获得充能。

longDescription.original: Dungeon Master waves his hands, and the Ultimate ability with the longest remaining cooldown immediately recharges. The cooldown for this Ultimate is set to the time the recharged Ultimate had left. Dungeon Master increases the damage of all Champions in the formation for half of the time his Ultimate is cooling down.
longDescription.display: 地下城主挥舞手臂，使当前剩余冷却时间最长的杀招技能立即获得充能。此杀招的冷却时间等于被充能杀招的剩余冷却时间。地下城主提高阵型中所有勇士的伤害，持续时间为其杀招冷却时间的一半。

description.original: Dungeon Master buffs the damage of all Champions based on the number of Champions under 20 in the formation.
description.display: 地下城主根据阵型中 20 岁以下勇士（包括他自己）的数量，来提高所有勇士（包括他自己）的伤害。

description.original: Dungeon Master can be used in any adventure regardless of restrictions, he can also bring a Special Guest Star with them.
description.display: 地下城主可以在所有冒险中使用，不受任何限制，他还可以带上一位特别客座明星一起参战。

description.desc: $(source_hero) is eligible to start in all adventures, even if the Patron, Variant, or other restrictions would say otherwise.
即使不满足赞助者、支线任务或其他限制的要求，$(source_hero)仍有资格开始所有探险。

$(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation that is $(upgrade_value 7844,1) years or younger, stacking multiplicatively. If the sum of the $(not_buffed num_of_youngest___3) youngest Champions' ages is $(not_buffed max_age_sum___3) years or less, the bonus is increased by $(amount___3)% (post-stack).

$(source_hero)阵型中每有一位 $(upgrade_value 7844,1) 岁或以下的勇士，所有勇士的伤害都会提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，并以乘算方式叠加。如果 $(not_buffed num_of_youngest___3) 位最年轻的勇士年龄之和为 $(not_buffed max_age_sum___3) 岁或更小，则伤害提高 $(amount___3)%（叠加后）。

tipText.original: Dungeon Master buffs the damage of all champions based on the number of Champions under 20 in the formation
tipText.display: 地下城主根据阵型中 20 岁以下的勇士数量，来提高所有勇士的伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero) adds $(amount) temporary hit points to the entire party upon entering an area when $(source_hero) is present.
当$(source_hero)在队伍中并进入一个新区域时，$(source_hero)将为整个队伍增加 $(amount) 点临时生命值。

tipText.original: Dungeon Master grants Temporary Hit Points to everyone in the party everytime he chooses to join the formation for an area.
tipText.display: 地下城主每次在一个区域中加入阵型时，都会为所有队伍成员提供临时生命值。

description.desc: Upon entering a new Area, there is a $(chance)% chance that $(source_hero) does not appear in the formation and is replaced by a frightened Uni the Unicorn. While $(source_hero) is away, the formation's gold find is increased by $(amount)%. If you return to a previously completed area, $(source_hero) is always with the formation.
进入一个新区域时，独角兽“独角”有 $(chance)% 的几率代替$(source_hero)出现在阵型中。$(source_hero)离开时，阵型的金币寻获量提高 $(amount)%。如果你回到之前完成的区域，$(source_hero)将始终处于阵型中。

name.original: Where Did He Go This Time?

description.desc: The chance $(source_hero) doesn't join the formation in Disappearing Act is increased to 75%, and gold find amount is also increased by $(amount___2)%.
$(source_hero)在消失行为中不加入阵型的几率提高到 75%，金币寻获量增加 $(amount___2)%。

specializationName.original: Where Did He Go This Time?

specializationDescription.original: Dungeon Master is pulled away more frequently
specializationDescription.display: 地下城主被拉走的频率更高

description.desc: The chance $(source_hero) doesn't join the formation in Disappearing Act is decreased to 25%, and the temporary hit points gained by Words of Encouragement are increased by $(amount___2)%.
$(source_hero)在消失行为中不加入阵型的几率降低至 25%，鼓励之词获得的临时生命值提高 $(amount___2)%。

specializationDescription.original: Dungeon Master stays close to the Champions
specializationDescription.display: 地下城主与勇士保持紧密联系

description.pre: Dungeon Master uses his powers to plane shift in Champions that are not normally eligible for the adventure. Preference is given to bench seats with no eligible Champion. Dungeon Master will not select his own seat.
地下城主用他的力量对通常没有资格参加冒险的勇士进行异界传送。转移时将优先考虑没有勇士可以参战的出战栏位。地下城主不会选择他自己的栏位。

conditions.desc: ^^当前客座明星：第 $d_s1_seat 栏位（代表勇士：$d_s1_seat_core_hero）

description.pre: $(source_hero) uses his powers to plane shift in one random Champion that is normally not eligible for the adventure. Preference is given to bench seats with no eligible Champion. The Champion can not be from $(source_hero)'s seat.
$(source_hero) 用他的力量将一位没有资格参加冒险的随机勇士进行位面转移。转移时将优先考虑没有勇士可以参战的出战栏位。勇士不能来自$(source_hero)的出战栏位。

description.original: With each brave deed, you grow more worthy.
description.display: 随着每一次勇敢的行动，你会变得更有价值。

description.original: The life of a Dungeon Master is not an easy one.
description.display: 地下城主的生活并不轻松。

description.original: I have much to tell you and little time!
description.display: 我有很多事情要告诉你，但时间不多！

description.original: You carry the way within you.
Evil deeds return to their source.
You will find both safety and danger ahead.
description.display: 你会发现前方既安全又危险。

description.original: The choice, my children, is yours.
description.display: 孩子们，选择在你们手中。

description.original: Not so fast, young ones. Coins are precious!
description.display: 别这么急，年轻人。钱币是很宝贵的！

description.original: Is it magic or fate? I'll never tell.
description.display: 这是魔法还是命运？我永远都分不清。
啊，时间又再一次流动了。

effects.description: Increases the age limit of Dungeon Master's Patience Young Ones by 5 years.

description.original: A Dungeon Master appears when they mean to!
description.display: 地下城主在想要出现的时候就会出现！

description.original: It is not yet your time. More adventure awaits!
description.display: 你还不能死。还有更多冒险在等着你！

description.original: You are only as old as you feel, adventurers!
description.display: 冒险者们，心态决定年龄！

effects.description: Increases the age limit of Dungeon Master's Patience Young Ones by 10 years.

name.original: Herald of the Champions Dungeon Master

character_sheet_details.backstory: He is Dungeon Master, your guide in the realm of Dungeons & Dragons!

event_upgrades.description: Dungeon Master can be used in any adventure regardless of restrictions, he can also bring a Special Guest Star with them.
